summary: Completed testing of MR Panel Offline Mode fix. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend compiles and all MR pages load correctly. Offline data pre-caching works (4/4 datasets cached on login). Service worker v3 accessible with networkFirst caching strategy.
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in MRCustomers.jsx and MRFollowups.jsx about missing useEffect dependencies - not critical but should be addressed
seed_data_creation: Used existing MR account (Test MR) and customer data
context_for_next_testing_agent: MR Panel offline mode fix verified. Key components: 1) offlineData.js utility with fetchWithOffline(), prefetchEssentialData(), getCachedCustomers(), getCachedItems() exports. 2) MRLayout.jsx pre-fetches 4 datasets on login when online. 3) Service worker mr-sw.js v3 with networkFirst caching for API endpoints. 4) All MR components (MRDashboard, MRCustomers, MROrders, MRVisits, MRFollowups) use fetchWithOffline() for API calls with localStorage fallback.

MR Login.POST /api/mr/login with valid credential: PASS - Returns access_token and mr object

MR Customers (Critical for Offline Order.Customers page UI: PASS - Shows customer cards grouped by type

MR Orders.New Order form: PASS - Opens with customer search and item search inputs

MR Visits.Visits page UI: PASS - Shows visit log with New Visit button

Service Worker.Service worker registered on login: PASS - Console shows [MR-PWA] Service worker registered

Offline Data Pre-caching.offlineData.js exports: PASS - prefetchEssentialData, fetchWithOffline, getCachedCustomers, getCachedItems all exported
